name: @polyrader/server
description: Application layer - Express API + WebSocket server

scripts.build:bundle: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/polyrader-server.js --external:better-sqlite3 --external:bufferutil --external:utf-8-validate --banner:js='import{createRequire}from"module";const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);' && bun build --compile src/index.ts --outfile=dist/polyrader-server
